examples: He put away his clothes in the closet.
They put away the equipment after use.
You should put away some emergency funds.
They put away a portion of their income.
She puts away money every month.
I'm trying to put away for a house.
Put away the dishes after washing.
example_translate: Он убрал свою одежду в шкаф.
Тебе следует отложить немного на чрезвычайные расходы.
put away.synonyms:
Убирать (на место) - store, tidy up, put back
Откладывать (деньги) - save, set aside
